items.title: Label-preserving augmentation pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  raw["Labeled example"]
  tf["Random transform"]
  view["Augmented view"]
  model["Model trains on view"]
  label["Same label"]
  raw --> tf --> view --> model
  raw --> label
  label --> model
items.caption: The transform changes appearance; the supervision signal stays fixed when the augmentation is semantically valid.

items.title: Train vs validation augmentation policy
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  trainSplit["Training split"]
  valSplit["Validation / test split"]
  randomAug["Random augmentation each batch"]
  fixedPrep["Fixed deterministic preprocessing"]
  fit["Parameter updates"]
  eval["Unbiased metrics"]
  trainSplit --> randomAug --> fit
  valSplit --> fixedPrep --> eval
items.caption: Random augmentation during training increases diversity; held-out evaluation uses stable preprocessing.

items.title: Augmentation reduces memorization
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  small["Small labeled set"]
  noAug["Train without augmentation"]
  withAug["Train with augmentation"]
  mem["Memorize exact training rows"]
  gen["Learn invariant features"]
  small --> noAug --> mem
  small --> withAug --> gen
items.caption: Without augmentation, flexible models memorize training specifics; augmentation pushes the model toward features that survive perturbation.
